subject: Investor Relations - Quarterly Earnings Call Prep
body:
IR and Executive Team,

Prep materials for our Q1 2026 earnings call (April 5th, 4:30 PM ET):

Key Messages:
1. Strong revenue beat: $12.8M vs $12.1M consensus
2. First profitable quarter (EBITDA $1.4M)
3. Record net retention rate of 126%
4. AI product adoption accelerating (34% of users)

Anticipated Analyst Questions:
- AI product margin trajectory (prepare answer on path to 60%+)
- Timeline for sustained profitability (avoid specific timeline, focus on margin levers)
- Impact of macro on enterprise pipeline (pipeline remains healthy, 3.8x coverage)
- International expansion plans (Japan entry, conservative approach)
- M&A appetite (opportunistic, focused on product gaps)

Logistics:
- Press release draft due: April 2nd
- Earnings call script first draft: March 28th
- Management rehearsal: April 3rd, 2pm
- Quiet period begins: March 25th

Reminder: During quiet period, do not discuss financial performance with external parties. Direct all inquiries to IR.

Slide deck template attached. Please populate your sections by March 27th.
